title: nyc boundaries menu
author: @dcookchi
description: A simple interactive map that queries the NYC Open Data portal and visualizes the many different political and administrative geographic boundaries used in New York City

title: NYC 311 Complaint Analytics Dashboard
author: @emmaliangren
description: Visualize and explore New York City 311 service request data through an interactive cluster map, resolution time analytics by agency, and complaint volume trends over time. Powered by a live data pipeline that continuously ingests from the NYC Open Data API.

title: NYC Hotspot ETL
author: @JackJazwinski
description: A Python script designed to create an interactive map of public Wi-Fi hotspots in New York City. It works by first fetching the latest hotspot data from the NYC Open Data API, then cleaning and processing this data for accuracy using pandas, and finally, generating an HTML map with folium that visualizes these locations.

title: NewYorkCollisionVisualizations
author: @gustavoreino
description: This project provides an interactive data visualization dashboard built with Plotly using publicly available NYC Motor Vehicle Collisions data.

title: NewYork real estate Dashboard
author: @vineelagade
description: Interactive New York real estate dashboard built in Excel using Power Query and Power Pivot for data analysis and visualization.

title: Airbnb NewYork Dashboard
author: @umesh290
description: Designed a dynamic Excel dashboard to analyze Airbnb New York data, recommending top  listings based on price, reviews, room type, etc. Leveraged PivotTables, slicers, and charts for  interactive filtering and visualization, enabling tailored insights and user-friendly  recommendations which later on increased 20% more involvement in Airbnb.

title: NYC Dashboard PowerBI
author: @Dineshkumarsubramani
description: New York  City Schooling Data Visualization  using PowerBI

title: New York s City Bike Trips 2022
author: @Alfredo-R-S
description: Data Visualization with Python: Creating a Strategic Dashboard

title: Motor vehicle collisions in New York City Tableau Dashboard
author: @Prasanthi55
description: The project utilized Tableau for data visualization and skills such as data cleaning, exploratory data analysis (EDA), and various visualization techniques. These insights highlight actionable measures such as implementing traffic-calming systems and enhanced pedestrian crossings, which could potentially reduce accidents by up to 25% targeted.

title: Data Visualization Tableau
author: @nbethala
description: AirBnB New York City Rental Market - Data Visualization and dashboard using Tableau

title: NYC Borough dashboard
author: @Aakash-Suryavanshi2
description: Visualization on finding the best borough to live in New York City

title: Customer Engagement statistics
author: @pprajnadata
description: This dataset provided statistics and performance metrics about the volume and responsiveness in engaging with customers via several customer engagement channels. Data was provided for New York City Transit Subway and Bus customer engagement and customer service teams between May 2017 and May 2022.

title: Hispabot Action App
author: @WP-News-Press
description: HISPABOT: AI-Driven Community Service Assistant for WP News. Engineered to transform complex public data into actionable insights for the bilingual immigrant community. Empowering New York through Action Journalism and Civic Tech. 🤖💎🗽

title: NYC Rep Lookup
author: @vpradoQEDC
description: A GitHub repo for looking up elected representatives in New York City by address or district, pulling data from sources like NYC Council, State Assembly, and Congress. Useful for civic apps, voter tools, or local government dashboards in NYC.

title: HN Wrapped 2025
author: @hubraumhugo
description: An interactive tool that generates roasts and stats based on a user's Hacker News activity, as well as a personalized front page from 2035 and an xkcd-style comic

title: NYC Rentals Dashboard
author: Unknown
description: An interactive dashboard to explore NYC rentals data

title: Forkestrate
author: u/uhohhotdog555
description: A recipe app that rethinks how recipes are followed, especially for those who find the traditional format overwhelming
